summary: Completed testing of Iteration 19 features: Live Match Manual Fetch, Scheduler, and Chat with Live Context. All 7 requested features verified working. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

issues: Minor React warning: textTransform prop on DOM element - cosmetic only
Chart width/height warning when container not visible - cosmetic only

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ shows scheduler active with next_runs=['4:00 PM IST', '7:00 PM IST']
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/promote-now returns status='done' and promotes matches to 'live'
Backend: GET /api/schedule shows live matches with status='live' (ipl2026_008, ipl2026_009)
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/chat returns enriched answer with live context (batsmen, projected score, algorithm probabilities)
Backend: Chat consultation_summary includes win_probability, value_signal, confidence, fair_odds
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns cached live data with score, batsmen, bowler
Backend: Match state includes projected_score in probabilities
Backend: Match state includes algorithm probabilities (ensemble, bayesian, monte_carlo, dls_resource)
Backend: Promoted matches have status='live' and promotedAt timestamp
Frontend: No auto-fetch on page load (0 POST to /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live)
Frontend: Consult tab is default active (has blue background)
Frontend: Fetch Live Scores button exists and is clickable
Frontend: Live data displayed from cache (score 18/2, batsmen Rohit/Tilak/Rickelton, bowler Mukesh)
Frontend: Chat returns enriched answer referencing live match data
Frontend: ConsultantDashboard visible with RUN CONSULTATION button
critical_code_review_comments: LiveMatch.js useEffect (line 32-50) correctly loads match state via getMatchState() without calling fetchLiveData() - auto-fetch removed as requested
Manual fetch button at line 136 correctly calls handleFetchLive() which triggers fetchLiveData()
Consult tab is default active via useState('consult') at line 28
server.py scheduler at promote_matches_to_live() correctly promotes today's matches to 'live' status
server.py api_chat() correctly builds live context via _build_live_chat_context() and passes to gpt_consultation()
ai_service.py gpt_consultation() accepts live_context param and includes it in GPT prompt for enriched answers
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing matches ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC with live data) and ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 features fully working. Key changes: (1) LiveMatch page no longer auto-fetches live data on page load - user must click 'Fetch Live Scores' button manually. (2) Scheduler runs at 4PM and 7PM IST to promote today's matches to 'live' status. (3) Chat endpoint returns enriched answers with full live match context (batsmen, bowler, algorithm probabilities, projected score, chase analysis). (4) Consult tab is default active on LiveMatch page. (5) Live data for ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) is cached in DB with score 18/2 in 2.5 overs.

no_auto_fetch.description: LiveMatch page does NOT auto-fetch live data on page load
no_auto_fetch.verification: 0 POST requests to /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live detected during page load

manual_fetch_button.description: Manual 'Fetch Live Scores' button works when clicked

scheduler_promote.description: POST /api/scheduler/promote-now promotes today's matches to 'live' status

schedule_live_matches.description: GET /api/schedule shows live matches with status='live'

health_scheduler_info.description: GET /api/ shows scheduler active with 4PM/7PM IST

chat_with_live_context.description: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/chat returns enriched answers with live match data

consult_tab_default.description: Consult tab is default active on LiveMatch page
consult_tab_default.verification: Tab has bg-[#007AFF] class indicating active state
